title: First-login password change persists across reload
description:
Users created with a default password must set a new password before entering PipeSync or PipeShare. Previously, reloading the login page or opening pipesync.html directly would skip the Change Default Password step and land in the dashboard with the default password still active.

This batch enforces the gate on session restore (login.html reload), PipeSync boot, and client-portal boot. The flag clears only after a successful change-password call on the backend.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Login session restore shows Change Default Password when mustChangePassword is still true instead of redirecting to the dashboard.
PipeSync and mobile shells redirect to login until default password is replaced.
PipeShare client-portal boot redirects to unified login when mustChangePassword is set.
Portal session sync stores mustChangePassword from GET /session for reliable gate checks.
Includes prior fix: omit current password on first-login change-password (commit 9657efb).
Cache bust pwdfix on login-main, PipeSync boot, and portal runtime.
